jurisdiction_name: PRECINCT ALLEN TWP NEW WESTON & ROSSBURG
narrative:
Precinct Allen Twp New Weston & Rossburg (precinct in Darke County) has 666 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.1 percentage points.
